title: Revamped Piles
description: A Vanilla+ mod for better vanilla structures.

# ✨ What is Revamped Piles? ✨
Revamped Piles is the perfect mod for players who love original Minecraft structures but want a more detailed, immersive experience. It enhances the vanilla feel with:

**480+ new decoration blocks ┃ Beautiful structure reworks ┃ Upgraded world generation  
Faithful to Minecraft's aesthetic**

| ![](https://i.imgur.com/oHl65uf.gif) | ![](https://i.imgur.com/u3MOmmh.gif) | ![](https://i.imgur.com/ZaX99iB.gif) |
|:------------------------------------:|:------------------------------------:|:------------------------------------:|
|            Plains Village            |            Desert Village            |             Snowy Village            |
|                                      | ![](https://i.imgur.com/ppywbXW.gif) | ![](https://i.imgur.com/Fwghe1S.gif) |
|                                      |             Desert Temple            |                 Igloo                |

_**Enjoy a Minecraft world that feels fresh yet familiar!**_  
[🖼️ Gallery](https://imgur.com/gallery/revamped-piles-0-4-0-gallery-yiTX0lu)┃[🌍 Contribute Translations](https://github.com/TheRevamper/RevampedPiles)┃[🆕 Changelog](https://modrinth.com/mod/revamped-piles/changelog)

## 🔒 Important notice 🔒

Revamped Piles is the sole property of [TheRevamper](https://modrinth.com/user/TheRevamper) and is exclusively available on Modrinth.  
Reposting or re-uploading the mod files on any other website is strictly prohibited.  
Please report any unauthorized uploads.

⚠️ Revamped Piles is **NOT** available on **CurseForge** ⚠️

![](https://i.imgur.com/fwi53HY.png)

## 🧱 Ownership & Continuation 🧱

**As of July 2024, ownership of the mod and its associated account has been transferred due to personal responsibilities of the previous owner.**  
Moving forward, I am committed to revitalizing and enhancing the mod while adhering to its original goals and roadmap.

As requested by [u/Flying_Nokk](https://www.reddit.com/user/Flying_Nokk/) on Reddit, a Vanilla Generation version of the mod is available.  
➡️ [Latest Vanilla Generation version available here](https://modrinth.com/mod/revamped-piles/version/0.3.2-vg) ⬅️

⚠️ **Please install only one version of the mod at a time!** ⚠️  
The Vanilla Generation edition is independent from the original version and should not be used simultaneously.

![](https://i.imgur.com/fwi53HY.png)
